description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow set within a fenced grassy yard, featuring a modern minimalist design. The front facade has a central entrance door flanked by several rectangular windows and a wooden deck area with outdoor furniture. The roof is a simple, low-pitched gable style in dark color, contrasting with the light-colored exterior walls. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a spacious lawn with a few small trees. The rear side of the bungalow is plain, with evenly spaced windows and no visible entry. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential context, ideal for a small family.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with a gable roof, light exterior walls, and a wooden deck, set in a fenced grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, a wooden deck, outdoor furniture, and part of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the gable roof, and the deck area extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with evenly spaced windows and no visible entry or deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, part of the deck, and the fenced grassy yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front and rear windows, evenly spaced
